name: search-gateway
description: Cloudflare Worker search/fetch gateway for AI agents in restricted networks.

scripts.check: node --check src/index.js && node --check tests/test-worker.mjs && node --check tests/search-quality-eval.mjs && node --check tests/search-ranking-diff.mjs
scripts.test:ci: npm run check && npm test && npm run test:search-quality && python3 tests/test-plugin.py && python3 -m py_compile tests/test-plugin.py && npm run dry-run
